all_issues.title: Excessive scripts detected (53 total, 15 app scripts)
all_issues.description: The page loads 53 external scripts. Each Shopify app installed adds scripts that accumulate and slow the store.
all_issues.recommendation: Audit installed apps in Shopify admin. Remove unused apps. Each unused app slows load time.
all_issues.impact: 1 second delay = 7% conversion drop. Slow stores drive 40%+ bounce rate increase.

all_issues.title: No privacy policy link in site footer
all_issues.description: No privacy policy or POPIA notice link detected anywhere on the homepage. This is reported once — the fix is a single change to footer.liquid.
all_issues.recommendation: Add a privacy policy link to footer.liquid. Shopify auto-generates /policies/privacy-policy — link to it from the footer nav.
all_issues.impact: POPIA (South African law) requires visible privacy notice. Legal exposure if absent.
